misc: If not on the course, he is probably billing clients
biography: Lassi, a formidable presence on the greens, brings a unique blend of intellect and precision to the game. Representing Lakeside Golf Vammala, Lassi has graced the Hector Trophée with his presence on nine occasions, showcasing his consistent dedication to the sport.
While the coveted Hector Trophée has eluded his grasp, Lassi's exceptional skill has been rewarded with one Victor Trophy, a testament to his individual prowess.

Beyond the fairways, Lassi is a lawyer by profession. Known for his sharp mind and meticulous attention to detail, one might surmise that if he is not on the course, he is probably billing clients. Despite his demanding career, Lassi remains an active participant in Hector events, demonstrating his unwavering commitment to golf and the camaraderie it fosters.
While Lassi will not be participating in Hector Trophée 2026, there is always a chance that he might make a last-minute appearance.
